skillsViewerDesc: View and manage AI coding tools' Skills configuration files, compatible with Claude, CodeBuddy, Qoder, Trae, Opencode
skillsViewerUnsupported: Skills Viewer requires desktop Electron environment, not available in current environment
noSkillsAllTools: No Skills files found for any AI tool
noSkillsForTool: No Skills files found for this tool
skillsPathHint: Skills are typically stored in ~/.claude/skills/ or .claude/skills/ in project directory
projectPathPlaceholder: Enter project root directory path for scanning project-level Skills
editSkillHint: Click save button after editing to write to file
